prompt: wrap up. today i worked on the lead-gen project — added a sheets_importer.py scraper, rewrote the linkedin transformer to use the new ICP scoring system, and deleted the old google_search.py and product_hunt.py scrapers since we're consolidating sources. i decided to drop product hunt as a lead source because the signal quality was too low.

assertions.text: Output contains a session summary with specific items from the lead-gen work
The 'drop product hunt' decision is explicitly extracted with correct DECISION | REASONING | CONTEXT format
Output includes the final closeout block with all 4 fields: summary, decisions logged, priorities updated, memory saved
Output checks priorities and makes a judgment (no change expected since lead-gen is already listed as live)
